title: 我觉得 AI 幻觉可能是避免不了的了，这也许就是人类工程师还存在的理由？
content: AI hallucinations are unavoidable, especially with complex documents. A better RAG approach is to parse files into a structured title tree, keeping tables, images, and context intact. Build a lightweight knowledge graph with chapter paths, summaries, and links, so the model can navigate precisely rather than guessing. This method boosts accuracy from ~53 % to 79 % and improves search speed and token usage. The open-source tool Knowhere implements this workflow for enterprise, legal, financial, and academic use.

title: 让智能体看见世界：CV × AI Agent 的行业场景新实践| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
content: The talk explains how integrating computer vision (CV) with AI agents creates a multiplier effect, enabling digital agents to understand and act on the physical world. Daqia Inc. has built the Xinghan model series—V for vision, L for language, M for multimodal—to give systems a clear perception of global and local environments. These models power industry‑specific agents that learn business logic and perform autonomous tasks, as demonstrated in public safety, industrial inspection, and forest fire prevention. The goal is to embed AI as a secure, industry‑aligned “outside brain” rather than just a chatbot.

content: China’s securities regulator announced on May 22 that Tiger Brokers (NZ) Ltd, Futu Securities International HK and Changqiao Securities HK will face heavy penalties for illegal cross‑border operations. Their illicit gains will be confiscated. A two‑year “clean‑up” period will bar foreign firms from offering buy‑or‑sell services to domestic clients, allowing only one‑way sell transactions. After the period, foreign entities must shut down all domestic sites and stop all trading services. This action aims to dismantle overseas securities‑fund operations.

content: Microsoft will shut down all use of Anthropic’s Claude Code by the end of June, moving its ≈100,000 engineers to its own GitHub Copilot CLI. The decision is driven by rising token‑based costs, as each line of code generated by Claude costs Microsoft money. Similarly, Uber’s CTO reported the company had exhausted its 2026 AI budget in just four months, highlighting how token‑pricing is turning AI from a productivity tool into a significant budget drain.

title: 教室带宽不低于100兆、学生座椅有靠背，《中小学基本办学条件底线要求》发布 | 原文
content: The Education Ministry and three other departments released the “Basic School Operating Conditions – Bottom‑Line Requirements,” setting new standards for primary and secondary schools. The guidelines cover five areas: school buildings, safety, living facilities, teaching equipment, and staff. They include 20 minimum requirements, such as a minimum 100 Mbps classroom internet bandwidth, student chairs with backs, flagpoles, safety upgrades for dangerous houses, campus security systems, and fire safety compliance. The goal is to meet all standards across all schools within three years.

content: Cleve Moler, the mathematician and co‑founder of MathWorks who created MATLAB, died on May 20, 2026. His work in numerical mathematics and software development significantly shaped computer science and engineering education. Moler’s legacy includes fundamental contributions to scientific computing, widely used mathematical software, and mentorship of future researchers. He is remembered for his impact on computational tools and academic outreach.

title: 「穷人碳水脸」「这就是碳水脸和蛋白脸的差距」等说法刷屏，如何看待这种说法？算是一种审美霸凌吗？
content: The phrases “poor‑people carbohydrate face” and “the gap between carbohydrate and protein faces” have fallen into viral trends, prompting debate. Critics argue these labels are reductive and perpetuate negative stereotypes about facial features linked to diet or socioeconomic status. Supporters see them as descriptive commentary. Many view the trend as a form of aesthetic bullying, as it targets and humiliates individuals based on appearance and perceived lifestyle. The controversy highlights broader concerns about how online discourse can reinforce harmful beauty standards.

title: 复旦大学副教授沈奕斐遭小学家长疯狂举报两个月，复旦认定其无违规行为，如何看待此事？
content: In March 2026, Fudan University associate professor Shen Yifei faced repeated complaints from a kindergarten parent after a live‑stream discussion about alleged school bullying. Shen explained the incidents were normal child interactions, not bullying; the parent then reported him for privacy breaches, teaching interference, and other concerns. Over two months, Shen submitted statements and cooperated with investigations. Fudan’s inquiry found no misconduct, confirming Shen’s remarks were professional and no privacy was violated. The university did not impose any disciplinary action.

title: 潮水退去，裸泳的一定不止五粮液
content: The article examines the 2025 financial “caveat” filed by Chinese distillery Wuliangye, which dramatically cut revenue and profit figures by reclassifying large amounts of inventory as “regulatory goods” and related receivables. Analysts view the move as exposure of long‑term over‑inflated earnings from forced inventory allocations to distributors, eroding trust in the premium‑whisky sector. Despite aggressive stock‑buybacks and dividends, the company’s stock has fallen sharply. The paper also situates Wuliangye’s struggles within broader industry pressures: shifting consumer preferences toward lower‑strength drinks, inventory glut, and a move toward sales‑based production.

title: 史上首次，Anthropic要赚钱了
content: Anthropic has reported its first profitable quarter, with revenue projected at $10.9 billion and operating profit of $559 million—doubling last quarter’s $4.8 billion and beating its own two‑year forecast. The company achieved rapid growth by securing multi‑vendor compute contracts (NVIDIA, Amazon Trainium, Google TPU, SpaceX Colossus, and Microsoft’s Maia chips), driving app adoption of its Claude model to over 1,000 enterprises. In contrast, OpenAI’s Q1 revenue of $5.7 billion yielded a negative adjusted operating margin of –122 %, and ChatGPT’s user growth has stalled. Anthropic’s multi‑source compute strategy has accelerated its path toward a $10 billion+ valuation and early IPO plans.

title: 我问什么觉得 ai 写速度还不如人工快？主要是后期不断修改太耗时了。
content: I rewrote a large Go server (~100,000 lines) using AI code generation. Initially I reviewed the code in real time, but once the AI produced finished snippets, I stopped reviewing during generation and started a post‑generation audit. The code ran but had many issues: leaks, duplicate logic, poor architecture, incorrect branches, missing features. Fixing them required large rewrites, necessitating further AI runs and reviews, creating a cycle that increased total effort 10–20 times the original manual coding. The project remains incomplete with many bugs.

title: 👋🏻👋🏻再见，拉勾网——那个"最懂互联网人"的招聘平台倒了😭
content: Lagou, once a unicorn valued at $150 million and the go‑to platform for internet recruiters, filed for voluntary bankruptcy in May 2026, ending its 13‑year run. Founded in 2013 by Xu Dandan from a rural background, Lagou grew rapidly by catering exclusively to internet talent, attracting over 20,000 companies and raising $25 million in funding. A 2017 majority stake sale to 51Job and subsequent leadership exits weakened its core team. The COVID‑era layoffs, rising competition—especially from BOSS直聘—and Lagou’s narrow vertical focus left it unable to adapt, driving its collapse.

title: 抓住人性周期规律
content: The article argues that stock market cycles mirror human psychology: hype pushes prices up, fear drives them down. Investors are manipulated by opinion at both tops and bottoms, prompting chasing gains or selling losses. The author stresses that rational investors should focus on intrinsic value, not price swings, and that most people lose while a few profit. Breaking out of the cycle requires understanding these emotional patterns, protecting against downside, and avoiding chasing fads. Success depends on learning through experience rather than following market sentiment.

title: 60年一遇的变革--英伟达到底在干什么？
content: NVIDIA is redefining computing by moving from general-purpose CPUs to “Accelerated Computing,” which couples programmable GPUs with industry‑specific libraries and hardware co‑design. This shift replaces the stalled Moore’s Law growth path and turns computation into a core product for science, industry, and AI. Even without AI, accelerated computing drives growth; AI only accelerated market awareness. NVIDIA’s recent earnings show expanding enterprise (“ACIE”) demand and aggressive share repurchases, underscoring its shift from chip sales to a broad, high‑margin computing platform.

title: Cursor 的 Debug 模式误删我 E 盘 921GB 文件
content: A Windows user accidentally deleted 921 GB of data from their E drive while using Cursor's Debug mode. Cursor, which assists with Node and Electron debugging, created temporary files in the project’s `tmp` folder and then executed a dangerous delete command that mis‑parsed quotes in PowerShell. This caused all files in the E‑drive root to be removed, bypassing the Recycle Bin. The user now attempts recovery from backups; the incident serves as a warning against using Cursor’s Debug mode on Windows.

title: Multi-Stream LLMs: new paper on parallelizing/separating prompts, thinking, I/O
content: The paper introduces Multi‑Stream Large Language Models, a framework that separates and processes prompts, reasoning, and I/O operations in parallel streams. By decoupling these components, the model can handle multiple tasks simultaneously, improving throughput and enabling more efficient use of computational resources. The approach offers a new perspective on parallelizing language model workflows, potentially reducing latency for both inference and training.

These tools integrate with major engines, streamline workflows, and are supported by active communities.

title: We Reverse-Engineered Docker Sandbox's Undocumented MicroVM API
content: A research team examined Docker Desktop’s sandbox, reverse‑engineering its hidden MicroVM API to understand how Docker isolates containers. They documented undocumented features, revealing how the sandbox emulates an ARM64 VM in macOS to run container workloads securely. The study exposes the internal operation of Docker’s container runtime, including process isolation, networking, and filesystem handling, providing insight into the technology behind Docker's lightweight virtualization.

title: 红楼梦｜王夫人为什么拒绝黛玉的茶？贾母用一匹软烟罗，便回应了所有？ | 原文
content: The text discusses a subtle incident from *Dream of the Red Chamber*: when Jia’s mother offers tea to Lin Daiyu during a garden visit, she accepts and drinks the first cup, but then declines Daiyu’s second cup. title: Building GitHub’s next chapter in accessibility
content: GitHub’s five‑year accessibility program has expanded from an internal team to a company‑wide discipline, now embedded in engineering, design, AI, and culture. A new strategy shifts focus outward, engaging developers worldwide to improve open‑source accessibility. Actions include an assistive‑technology hackathon, an open‑source accessibility summit, published best‑practice guides, and platform updates such as redesigned pull requests, enhanced contrast, and accessible CLI tools like GitHub Copilot CLI. GitHub also shares tools, open‑source projects, and collaboration forums for communities to join the effort.
